label: Contact CTA
description: An email + phone block with optional message. Good for the bottom of any page.

settings.label: Intro text
settings.default: Reach out if you'd like to volunteer, host a Block Party, or join a training.

settings.heading: Get in touch
settings.intro: Have a question about PNEC programs, want to volunteer, or need help finding your block coordinator? Reach out — a real person reads every message.

settings.heading: Want to volunteer?
settings.intro: PNEC is 100% volunteer-run. Block coordinators, event helpers, training instructors, web admins — there's a role that fits how much time you can give.

settings.heading: For media & partners
settings.intro: If you're with a city agency, a fire district, a local nonprofit, or a news outlet, please reach out and we'll get back to you within one business day.
